Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paula Goodwin, via ZOOM, for Lenore Horowitz, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel which petition she intends to move forward with. Ms. Goodwin advises that she wishes to move forward with the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The court then points counsel to the Proof of Subscribing Witness Statement signed by Ira Meyerwitz and that the proof of Will in Lieu of Subscribing Witnesses mentions that Ira Meyerwitz was an incapable witness. Ms. Goodwin and Ms. Horowitz provide oral testimony in support of Mr. Ira's ability to act as a subscribing witness. The court advises that any issues regarding noticed are excused. No objections to this petition are presented.

After additional discussion, the court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 16, 2008, is admitted to probate. Lenore Horowitz is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 14, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Continued To Aug-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paula Goodwin appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it does not think Ms. Goodwin is there yet under Evidence Code 240, that you don't get to Probate Code 8221 until you get past Probate Code 8220 and that they need to establish witness unavailability under Evidence Code 240. The Court also noted that there is no evidence or personal knowledge of Mr. Meyerowitz's medical or physical condition, and with regard to Mr. Morgenstern being unwilling to execute a subscribing witness statement, they need to take it as far as contempt. Ms. Goodwin stated that the Petitioner is the only sole heir, that they could petition intestate, and that the decedent had no children, no spouse and no other siblings. Ms. Goodwin also stated that Mr. Meyerowitz is in a facility, that Mr. Morgenstern claims the decedent owes him money and that she explained a creditor's claim to him. The Court stated that the missing of the declaration under penalty and perjury makes the will not self-proving. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a new petition is filed, Ms. Goodwin is to use the same case number.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Jun-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
